prompt:
Create a realistic event-venue photo spot featuring an official life-size cardboard standee of an original anime girl character, as if photographed at an exhibition booth. Center the composition on one full-body vertical standee of Nozomu, printed with a white cutout border and mounted on a round white floor base with a small clear acrylic support at the feet. The character is a delicate pastel anime girl with very long wavy pale blush pink hair, large blue eyes, soft pink cheeks, and a shy elegant pose with one hand near her face and the other lightly holding her skirt. She wears a light powder-blue off-shoulder lace dress with puff sleeves, pearl and flower trim, a ribbon waist bow, layered translucent skirt, white lace embroidery, a small bouquet of pink and blue roses at the waist, and matching blue ribbon heels with floral details. Add a blue rose and pearl hair ornament on one side of her hair.

Set the booth background in a dreamy romantic blue-and-white floral theme. Use pale blue satin drapes, sheer white tulle curtains, hanging pearl strands, warm fairy lights, and abundant flower arrangements of white roses, cream flowers, baby’s breath, and dusty blue roses. Include exactly three main display props around the standee: 1) a large ornate signboard on the upper left with the text “SPECIAL EXHIBITION”, “LIFE-SIZE PANEL”, and “PHOTO SPOT” in elegant dark serif lettering, framed by pale blue decorative flourishes; 2) a smaller cream signboard on the right on a white pedestal with the text “のぞむ” above “NOZOMU”, decorated with blue floral ornaments; 3) a lace-covered round table on the lower left holding a small white birdcage and blue-white flowers. Add additional white vintage stands, sheer fabric, and floral garlands to make the installation feel immersive but not cluttered.

Use a vertical 4:5 composition, front-facing eye-level camera, soft indoor exhibition lighting, realistic floor tiles, subtle shadows, and a polished photographed-at-the-venue atmosphere. The visual style should combine photorealistic event decor with a high-quality printed anime standee illustration. Keep all visible text crisp and centered on the signs, preserve the Japanese name exactly as “のぞむ”, and avoid extra people, logos, watermarks, or unrelated signage.
